{{Quote|You are no '''common''' assassin. What exactly are… Ylkk!!| Sinya to [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]] as he ended her life|<ref name="Darth Maul (2000) 2">[[Darth Maul (2000) 2|''Darth Maul'' (2000) 2]]</ref>}}
'''Sinya''' was [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguard]] employed by the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] crime syndicate. Although she was not a [[The Force/Legends|Force]] user, she did wield a pair of perpendicular-gripped, [[Guard shoto/Legends|guard shotos]] with deep [[Color/Legends|purple]] blades.

==Biography==
===Black Sun===
{{Quote|Sinya's not impressed. Neither am ''I''.|Darnada|<ref name="Darth Maul (2000) 2" />}}
[[File:Sinyamaul.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Sinya wielding her pair of [[Guard shoto/Legends|guard shotos]] against [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]].]]
At the time of [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul's]] killing of [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun's]] chain of command, Sinya was serving the Black Sun [[Vigo/Legends|Vigo]] known as [[Darnada]] as his [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguard]]. When Maul approached the Vigo with the premise that he wished to join the crime syndicate, Sinya asserted her skepticism that Maul was "nothing special." Even as he decimated the room single-handedly, Sinya still mocked him, calling him a common [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]]. Sinya noticed, only at the end, as Maul quickly overpowered her, and only then did she express fear and doubt about who (or what) Maul was. The [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] beheaded her without a second glance, rendering her unable to defend her employer as Maul impaled him through the eye. Her pair of [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]] were presumably destroyed along with the rest of the Black Sun [[Deep Space Demolition and Removal|station]].

==Personality and traits==
Sinya was a somewhat arrogant individual, as demonstrated when she taunted Darth Maul during their duel. She was also not easily impressed, as noted by Darnada. Despite these traits, she did show fear and doubt as Maul began to gain the upper hand in their duel, recognizing him as much more than a "common assassin" but not as a Sith, unlike fellow Black Sun bodyguard [[Mighella]], who also recognized him as beyond an ordinary assassin but correctly deduced him to be a Sith Lord.

==Powers and abilities==
As a bodyguard for one of the vigos of Black Sun, Sinya was a force to be reckoned with. Despite not being Force-sensitive, she wielded a pair of guard shotos. She also managed to engage Darth Maul in combat and even hold her own against him before he decapitated her.
